{{CargoRelic
|name=Sepsung Phone
|class_id=20032
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=[[Koryeo Key Clues#Koryeo Treasure|Koryeo Key Clues - Koryeo Treasure]]
|description=As Koryeo's technology giant, Sepsung has an extended industry chain. They produce smartphones with the world's leading screens and processors, as well as groundbreaking super-energy batteries. After five minutes of charging, you'll rest in peace for eternity!
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=14
|civ=17
|tech=29
|ss1=Unlock Exploration Recall<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Unlock Exploration Recall<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +6<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Unlock Exploration Recall<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Unlock Exploration Recall<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Unlock Exploration Recall<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
